body_txt: A character has something driven into the palm of his hand (or, occasionally, the back) and right out the other side. Usually a knife, but may be a bullet. Crucially, it is done deliberately and usually (if it's not a bullet), quite slowly. This may be done for several reasons: Compare Five-Finger Fillet (a dangerous game of quickly stabbing between your fingers to show boldness). Related to Fingore and Palm Bloodletting . May result in Pinned to the Wall .
